# trader-research 仓库标准声明文案(AI 维护员补缺时使用)

## 中文(置于 README.md「免责声明」章节)

本仓库仅对公开材料做研究方法层面的归纳与复刻,不代表 <TRADER_NAME> 官方,与其无任何隶属关系,不验证任何收益声明,不构成任何投资建议。

## English (for README.en.md "Disclaimer" section)

This repository reconstructs a research method from public materials only. It is not affiliated with <TRADER_NAME>, does not verify any performance claims, and does not constitute investment advice.
